nasb.text: Because they do not regard the works of the Lord Nor the deeds of His hands, He will tear them down and not build them up.

esv.text: Because they do not regard the works of the Lord or the work of his hands, he will tear them down and build them up no more.

cnv.text: 他們既然不關心耶和華的作為，和他手所作的， 耶和華就必拆毀他們，不建立他們。

ccb.text: 他们既然毫不在意耶和华的作为和祂的创造， 祂必永远毁灭他们。

csbs.text: 因为他们无视耶和华的作为和他手所做的， 他就必拆毁他们，不建立他们！
